name: llm-provider-switch
description: get_chat_model() is the single provider abstraction: LLM_PROVIDER env var selects ollama (default) / openai / anthropic / claude_cli / copilot_cli. role/flow_name/containers only matter to the CLI-shelling providers' per-(flow, role) session singletons; every other provider constructs fresh per call and ignores them.
invariants: Unknown LLM_PROVIDER values raise ValueError rather than silently defaulting
Model-name defaults come from config.py constants; real credentials stay .env-only with no default
